purpose: Define notification outbox, templates, recipient targeting, delivery channels, WhatsApp Web fallback and future Make/messaging API integration without sending real messages.
templateRules: Templates must be editable per tenant and project when needed.
Templates must support role-specific tone and content.
Templates must avoid saying a message was sent by WhatsApp API or Make when only WhatsApp Web fallback is prepared.
Soft non-selection messages must avoid harsh rejection wording.
Admin/internal templates may include approvedBy and audit details; shopper-visible templates should show only user-appropriate content.
Templates must not expose sensitive internal fields or raw HR column names.
fallbackRules: If Make/messaging API is disabled, outbox prepares WhatsApp Web text and in-app notification.
WhatsApp Web fallback requires manual action and must be labelled manual_send_required until confirmed.
If recipient contact is missing or invalid, status must be requires_recipient_contact_review.
No real send occurs from this contract.
Future delivery attempts must preserve channel, timestamp, result, actor or system provider.

rules: Make and WhatsApp API remain future gates.
Manual WhatsApp Web text can be prepared but not counted as API sent.
In-app preview may be documented but not written by this contract.

newLessons: Difference between in-app notification, WhatsApp Web and future Make API
How to prepare a WhatsApp Web message
How Academy sends course/manual update notifications

hardStops: Do not send real WhatsApp API messages from this contract.
Do not call Make from this contract.
Do not send real email from this contract.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not mark manual WhatsApp Web text as API sent.
Do not expose sensitive internal fields in shopper/client notifications.
